---
title: "Research Paper Title"
subtitle: "SOC 106 Final Presentation — Your Name"
date: 05/05/2026
date-format: long
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard:
      buttons: false
    preview-links: auto
    css: slides.css
    scrollable: true
    footer: "SOC 106 | Spring 2026"
---

## Motivation & Research Question {.smaller}

**Why does this matter?**

- [1–2 sentences: What social problem or gap in knowledge motivated this study?]
- [Why should the class care? Who is affected?]

**Research Question**

> [State your research question clearly in one sentence.]

**Hypothesis**

- $H_1$: [Your main hypothesis — what do you expect to find and why?]
- $H_0$: [The null hypothesis — no relationship / no difference]

::: {.callout-note}
**Key theoretical claim:** [One sentence connecting your hypothesis to a broader sociological argument.]
:::

---

## Data, Variables & Method {.smaller}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Data**

- **Source:** [Dataset name, e.g., GSS 2022]
- **Sample:** [Who is included? n = ?]
- **Unit of analysis:** [Individuals / households / etc.]

**Key Variables**

| Role | Variable | Measurement |
|------|----------|-------------|
| Outcome (DV) | [name] | [how measured] |
| Key predictor (IV) | [name] | [how measured] |
| Controls | [name(s)] | [brief description] |
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Methodology**

- **Model:** [OLS / Logistic regression / Chi-squared / t-test]
- **Why this method?** [One sentence justification]
- **Any data prep decisions worth noting?** [Recodes, listwise deletion, etc.]

::: {.callout-tip}
**Potential limitations:** [Sample restrictions, missing data, measurement concerns]
:::
:::

::::

---

## Results {.smaller}

**[Insert your main figure or table here]**

```
[Replace this block with your ggplot / modelsummary output]
```

**What the results show:**

- [Finding 1: Direction + magnitude + significance, e.g., "Each additional year of education is associated with a 0.3 SD increase in income (p < .05)."]
- [Finding 2: Any notable secondary finding or subgroup pattern]
- [Finding 3: If null — what does the non-finding tell us?]

::: {.callout-note}
**Effect size check:** Is the effect substantively meaningful, not just statistically significant?
:::

---

## So What? {.smaller}

**Main takeaway**

> [One sentence: what did you find and what does it mean sociologically?]

**Contributions**

- [How does this add to or challenge existing research?]
- [Any policy or real-world implication?]

**What I'd do with more time**

- [Limitation 1 + how you'd address it]
- [Limitation 2]

::: {.callout-tip}
**Questions I'd love feedback on:**

1. [Specific methodological or interpretation question for the class]
2. [Optional second question]
:::
